problem id: 0c671b98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00011010 -> 10000110
  10001111 -> 11100011
  00100010 -> 10001000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00000011 -> 11000000
  11111100 -> 00111111
  11111110 -> 10111111

query: 00111000
predicted answer: 00001110
